summary: Tested event features including clickable events, event detail page with chat, locator tap-to-enable location button, and verified video upload fix. Fixed critical bug where event chat API was failing due to model mismatch.

fixed.issue: Event chat messages were failing with 500 error due to model mismatch (MessageResponse required from_user_id and to_user_id which don't apply to event chat)
fixed.fix: Created separate ChatMessageCreate and ChatMessageResponse models for event chat, updated event message endpoints to use them

integration_issues.issue: Calendar date buttons intercept click events when trying to click on events listed in the calendar modal. Events are visible but clicking them is blocked by calendar day buttons overlay

action_items: Calendar modal: Consider moving event list below calendar or adding better z-index to event items to prevent calendar day buttons from intercepting clicks
critical_code_review_comments: Video upload fix verified: handleAddGalleryVideo now uses asset.fileSize from ImagePicker instead of deprecated FileSystem.getInfoAsync
Events on home feed are properly wrapped in Pressable with router.push to /event/{id}
Event detail page correctly shows title, date, location, host, description, and Event Chat functionality
Locator shows 'Tap to enable location' button with requestForegroundPermissionsAsync on press
Map pins color logic (green=open, red=closed) is implemented in BusinessMap.native.tsx
seed_data_creation: Created test event 'TEST_Event_For_Click_Navigation' with event_id: event_e5c88d2ce0d2 for testing clickable navigation
context_for_next_testing_agent: Event features working well. Backend event chat API was fixed. Calendar modal has minor UX issue with event click interception. All other features verified: events clickable on home feed, event detail page loads, event chat shows/sends messages, locator has tap-to-enable button, map pins have open/closed colors in native.

features_verified.video_upload_fix: VERIFIED - Uses asset.fileSize instead of deprecated getInfoAsync
features_verified.events_clickable_calendar: PARTIAL - Events visible but click intercepted by calendar day buttons
features_verified.event_detail_page: VERIFIED - Shows title, date, time, location, host, description
features_verified.event_chat_functionality: VERIFIED - Shows messages, can send new messages
features_verified.locator_tap_to_enable: VERIFIED - Button visible with 'Tap to enable location' text
features_verified.map_pins_open_closed: VERIFIED IN CODE - Native component has isBusinessOpen logic with green/red colors
